Make the Right Choice

Wood vs Steel Doors

Not sure which door is right for you? Here's an honest comparison to help you decide.

🪵

Wood Door

Traditional choice

VS
🔩

Steel Door

Modern choice — Pelicano

Fire Resistance

❌ Burns easily

Fire Resistance

✅ Fire-resistant

Termite Proof

❌ Highly vulnerable

Termite Proof

✅ 100% termite-proof

Water Resistance

❌ Warps & swells

Water Resistance

✅ Fully water-resistant

Security

⚠️ Can be broken easily

Security

✅ High-security steel frame

Maintenance

❌ Needs regular polishing

Maintenance

✅ Zero maintenance needed

Lifespan

⚠️ 10–15 years

Lifespan

✅ 25+ years

Wood doors may look traditional but come at a long-term cost to your safety and wallet.

Steel is the smarter choice. Starting from ₹18,800.

Distributor Enquiry

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the starting price for a steel door?
Our doors start from ₹18,800 for Bathroom Doors. Single Steel Doors start from ₹23,500. Mother Son Doors from ₹33,500 and Twin Doors from ₹56,000. Installation charges are not included and will be quoted separately.
Do you offer installation?
Yes! We have trained technicians who install every door. Installation charges are separate from the door price and will be quoted based on your location and door type.
Do you deliver PAN India?
Yes, we deliver across India. Delivery charges vary by location. Contact us on WhatsApp for an exact delivery quote to your city.
Are the doors really fire-resistant?
Yes. All our steel doors pass fire resistance testing. They are manufactured with zinc-coated heat-transfer paint and a 0.8mm steel sheet for maximum protection.
Can builders place bulk orders?
Absolutely. We welcome bulk orders from builders, contractors, and housing projects. WhatsApp us for bulk pricing and project-specific quotes.
How do I become a distributor?
Fill in the distributor enquiry form above or WhatsApp us directly. We offer exclusive territory rights, competitive pricing, and full marketing support to our distributors.
